scope_summary: Correlate one successful SuiteLoginSessionValidation-to-home.php transition with the exact Apache and Metro request set for the same session window. Use Apache ssl_access_log, Metro localhost_access_log.txt, and relevant PHP code paths to identify which requests are the hard first-shell dependency versus nearby suite-frame or external-shell traffic. Prefer concrete session or request correlation where possible. Do not mutate appliance state.
